summary: Fixed all three issues: 1) Mojo's photo now shows in Soul Orb, 2) Multi-pet selector dropdown works with all 7 pets, 3) New Chat button creates new sessions correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Root cause: Multiple pet fetch functions in MiraDemoPage.jsx were overwriting pet data without including the 'photo' property
Fix 1: MiraTopBar.jsx (lines 228-248) - Added pet?.photo check alongside image_url and photo_url
Fix 2: MiraDemoPage.jsx (line 1124) - fetchAllPets() now includes photo_url transformation
Fix 3: MiraDemoPage.jsx (line 1467) - fetchPet() effect now includes photo property
Fix 4: usePet.js (line 59) - transformPetData now handles photo_url with API_URL prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet photo URL fix verified. The issue was that multiple useEffect hooks fetching pets were not preserving the photo property. API returns photo_url, not photo. All pet fetch locations must include: photo: p.photo_url ? `${API_URL}${p.photo_url}` : null

tested_flows.notes: Successfully logged in with test credentials and navigated to /mira-demo

tested_flows.flow: Mojo's photo appears in Soul Orb
tested_flows.notes: Pet photo IMG element exists with src: https://mojo-os-stage.preview.emergentagent.com/api/pet-photo/pet-99a708f1722a. Initial 'M' is hidden.

tested_flows.flow: Switch Pet button appears below Mojo's name
Click Switch Pet and verify dropdown shows all pets
tested_flows.notes: Dropdown shows 7 pets: Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Bruno, Luna, Buddy, Meister. Photos visible for pets with photo_url.

tested_flows.flow: Click different pet and verify view switches
tested_flows.notes: Clicked Lola, pet name changed to 'Lola', page context updated to Lola's picks

tested_flows.flow: Click New Chat button and verify it starts new session
tested_flows.notes: New Chat button clicked, console confirms: [SESSION] Started new session: mira-xxx for pet: Lola

issue_1_mojo_photo.problem: Mojo's photo not showing (shows M initial instead)
issue_1_mojo_photo.root_cause: Multiple pet fetch functions were overwriting pet data. fetchPet() at line 1458 was setting pet without photo property. API returns 'photo_url' but code expected 'photo' or 'image_url'
issue_1_mojo_photo.fix: Added photo property to all pet fetch locations with proper URL transformation: photo: p.photo_url ? `${API_URL}${p.photo_url}` : null

issue_2_pet_selector.status: Already implemented by main agent - verified working
issue_2_pet_selector.notes: MiraTopBar.jsx has pet selector button and dropdown at lines 262-315

issue_3_new_chat.notes: Button connected to startNewSession() at line 3565 in MiraDemoPage.jsx
